bank-of-england-inflation-calculator.title: Bank of England inflation calculator
bank-of-england-inflation-calculator.use: Long-run UK annual price index and latest monthly provisional UK values.

ons-cpi-d7bt.title: CPI INDEX 00: ALL ITEMS 2015=100 (D7BT)
ons-cpi-d7bt.use: Recent UK annual CPI values where the Bank of England embedded annual data has not yet caught up.

insee-franc-euro-purchasing-power.title: Coefficient de transformation de l'euro ou du franc d'une annee, en euro ou en franc d'une autre annee - Base 2025

bls-cpi-u-cuur0000sa0.title: CPI for All Urban Consumers: All Items in U.S. City Average
bls-cpi-u-cuur0000sa0.use: US CPI-U annual averages and partial current-year average when available.

eurostat-hicp-annual-euro-area.title: HICP - annual data (average index and rate of change)
eurostat-hicp-annual-euro-area.use: Euro area annual HICP average index.

world-bank-official-exchange-rate.title: Official exchange rate (LCU per US$, period average)
world-bank-official-exchange-rate.use: Annual average exchange rates through the latest complete World Bank year.

ecb-euro-reference-rates.title: Euro foreign exchange reference rates
ecb-euro-reference-rates.use: Current-year year-to-date reference-rate supplement for EUR, GBP, and KRW against USD.

FRF.note: The French franc was fixed to the euro for conversion. Store this explicitly so calculation code does not guess.
